visual_description: A man in profile is visible in a dimly lit interior, his gaze directed forward. Outside, two men in suits descend a metal staircase at night under artificial lighting, one carrying a briefcase. The scene is dark and urban, with a clock visible in the background and wet pavement reflecting lights.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a slightly breathy quality, speaking at a moderate pace with a neutral prosody.
